problem: What physical process in the brain produces subjective conscious experience?
mechanism: Default mode network connectivity measurement via fMRI
hypothesis: Combining Default mode network connectivity measurement via fMRI with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 35 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
